description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a structured silhouette and a fold-over flap closure. The exterior is predominantly a warm, tan-brown color with a marbled or tie-dye pattern in darker hues, giving it a unique and artistic appearance. The bag is equipped with two long, black adjustable shoulder straps, allowing it to be worn as a backpack. The flap closure is secured with a small metallic clasp at the front, and the bag appears to have a reinforced base for added durability. The material looks like a combination of leather or faux leather for the main body and synthetic fabric for the straps. There are no visible brand logos or decorative embellishments, keeping the design minimalistic and functional.
description: A structured, tan-brown handbag with a marbled pattern, black adjustable backpack straps, and a flap closure with a metallic clasp.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the bag, the curved flap, and the attachment of the black strap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the marbled flap, metallic clasp, and both black straps positioned behind the bag.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the bag's depth and strap attachment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full length of the two black adjustable straps and the plain marbled back panel.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, adjustable black shoulder straps attached at the top and bottom for backpack-style carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Fold-over flap with a metallic clasp located at the front center of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Marbled or tie-dye pattern in tan and brown hues.
